mood: A worn twilight craft world where coastal air, playable memory, and printed music surfaces fuse into one soft but restless plate.
lighting: Perpetual late-sunset light with warm peach and coral blooming across the upper field, cooled by teal shadow pockets and a quiet embedded screen-glow inside a few repaired surfaces.
object_inventory: one broad environmental tide-panel made of overlapping cut-paper land and water silhouettes
one dense repair cluster of album-like plates, snapped pixel chips, and mended edges
a rigid vertical brace or dark frame element that counters the surrounding fluid shapes
seedlike and island-like interruptions drifting between major masses
thin browser-memory apertures and slotted surface cuts that feel recovered rather than pristine
negative_constraints: no legible words, letters, numbers, logos, or interface labels anywhere in the image
no desk, office, dashboard, app mockup, or floating card grid
no greenhouse, conservatory, marsh shrine, or moonlit observatory repeat
no realistic shelf, cabinet, archive wall, or prop inventory
no glossy corporate polish; keep surfaces worn, printed, and atmospheric
no central altar, forge halo, or singular sacred-object composition
no hard sci-fi machine field dominating the scene
do not literally depict the reference subject or copy any album cover composition
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
